sections.paragraph: Ch. emph. יְדָא Dan 5:5, 24 with suff. יָדְךְ, יְדֵהּ, יֶדְהֶם, Ezr 5:8. Dual יְדַיִן Dan 2:34, 45 , i.q. Heb. יָד hand. מִן יַד from the hand, i.e. the power after a verb of liberating (compare Heb. מִיַּד), e.g. from the hand of the lions, Dan 6:28. As to Ezr 7:14, 25 Ezr 7:25, compare Heb. No. 1, aa.
